checks.description: Parse/API missingness analysis is reported in manuscript.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for explicit MCAR/MNAR and sensitivity text.

checks.description: Explicit MNAR bound scenarios are reported for headline metrics.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for worst-case MNAR bounds tied to C1→C4 effects.
Look for controlled mixture reporting in Exp3 discussion/appendix.

checks.description: CCE is formalized in main text with a worked example.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for CCE equation and worked numeric interpretation in main Findings text.
Look for no-wagering / leave-one-channel sensitivity text.

checks.description: Non-oracle/fallible-resolver utility appears in main claim path.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for explicit resolver-quality sensitivity in main text.

checks.description: Cost/latency-aware Pareto or frontier reporting appears in main text path.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for a cost/latency-aware frontier summary tied to C1/C4 utility.

checks.description: Instance-level baselines are discussed beyond narrow legacy frame.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for expanded frame details near Exp9 comparisons.

checks.description: Robust baseline set includes calibrated confidence and target-error grid framing.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for calibrated-confidence and conformal target-error grid reporting.

checks.description: Exp9 domain-component mapping validation is reported.
Recent metacognitive-control/abstention related work is integrated in main text.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for added related-work anchors in main section.

checks.description: Main text explicitly foregrounds budget-matched and frontier baseline comparisons.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for compact main-text baseline summary (not appendix-only framing).
Look for exp9_policy_frontier_summary.md with matched-escalation/autonomy slices.

checks.description: Manuscript discloses expanded Exp3 pair-level scale beyond the 112-task v2 bank.
checks.evidence_hint: Look for explicit expanded-pair sample-size statement in Exp3 results/discussion.

checks.description: Hard human packet v2 evidence is integrated (summary artifact + manuscript mention).
checks.evidence_hint: Expect human_baseline_hardv2_summary.md and main-text reference to harder packet execution.

actionable_items.description: Manuscript discloses expanded Exp3 pair-level scale beyond the 112-task v2 bank.
